description.text: Note: Industrial users will subscribe to this event by different implementation technologies.
Note: Newer records shall be added by adding a new highest index to the list.

Note: This set of information is defined by SMT drop-in "Contact Information" in (current) version 1.0, given by the SMT for Contact and Address Information V1.0. The ECLASS IRDI reserved for the SMC was added as supplementalSemanticId.
Note: Use this set of information, until version 1.1 of the SMT drop-in "Contact Information" is published.
Note: The idShort shall go without the index "__0__".

Note: this set of information is defined by SMT drop-in "Contact Information" in upcoming version 1.1, given by the SMT for Contact and Address Information V1.1. The ECLASS IRDI reserved for the SMC was added as supplementalSemanticId.
Note: Use this set of information, if version 1.1 of the SMT drop-in "Contact Information" is published.
Note: The idShort shall go without the index "__1__".
Note: Following the VDMA 24903, this mandatory global flag distincts between a PCN and PDN. Use either value PCN or PDN with valueId 0173-1#07-ABU000#003 (PCN) or 0173-1#07-ABU001#003 (PDN).

Note: According this global flag, the PCN milestone (173-1#07-ABU000#003) communicates the effective date of the PCN and the EOP milestone (EOP milestone (0173-1#07-ABU003#003) communicates the end of production date for the PDN in the life-cycle data.
Note: defined point in time with a specific meaning for life-cycle management (IEC 62890:2020).
Note: The PDN milestone is not to be used for this classification. Instead, the global flag PcnType is set with value=PCN and valueId=0173-1#07-ABU000#003.
Note: Date is in UTC (coordinated universal time). Typically, time is given, as well.
Note: Multiple classification systems might be used.
Constraint: At least one reason according VDM24903 shall be given.
Note: Examples for common names for classification systems are "VDMA24903" or "ECLASS".
Common version identifier of the used classification system, in order to distinguish different version of the property dictionary.
Note: Casing is to be ignored.
Note: 4 digit year of publication date of classifcation standard can serve as version.
Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the reason id given by ECLASS.
Note: Multiple classification systems might be used.
Constraint: At least one item category according VDM24903 shall be given.
Note: Examples for common names for classification systems are "VDMA24903".
Common version identifier of the used classification system, in order to distinguish different version of the property dictionary.
Note: Casing is to be ignored.
Note: 4 digit year of publication data of classifcation standard can serve as version.
Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the reason id given by ECLASS.
Constraint: Affected part numbers shall only be listed, if not the full range of part numbers produced for this item (product family and designation) is affected.
Note: Multiple single part numbers with wildcards or ranges of part numbers are listed.

Note: This Property codes only part number ("12345"), a set of part numbers ("12345;23456;34567"), a range of part numbers("10000-19999"). For each of these, wildcards like asterix ("1*8", all numbers starting with '1' and ending with '8') or question mark ("1?3?8", all 5 digit numbers starting with '1' and ending with '8' and middle as '5') are allowed.
Note: May be substituted by PcnChangeInformation

value.text: End of sales and substitution with superior product with IO Link.
Change of product dimensions because of RoHS
Because of this and that and that the following features changed: A, B, C..

description.text: Note: Suppliers are encouraged to add the conventional "product change information" documents and further details, e.g. photo-based or geometric change information to the PCN record.
Note: This File element can be used to attach the conventional "product change information" already provided by many suppliers or e.g. some detail geometry information.
Note: Date is in UTC (coordinated universal time). Typically, time is given, as well.
Note: mandatory property according to EU Machine Directive 2006/42/EC.
Note: mandatory property according to EU Machine Directive 2006/42/EC.
Note: Optional, as it might not exist for long term used items.
Note: This can be used to easily retrieve further information on the described item, such as full technical data, documentation, MCAD or ECAD models.
Note: It is encouraged to provide the actual product classficiation, e.g. by ECLASS, in order to ease the identification of relevant items by the industrial user.
Common version identifier of the used classification system, in order to distinguish different version of the property dictionary.
Note: Casing is to be ignored.
Note: the SMT "Technical Data" refers to this as: [IRI] https://admin-shell.io/ZVEI/TechnicalData/ClassificationSystemVersion/1/1
Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the product class.
Note: the SMT "Technical Data" refers to this as: [IRI] https://admin-shell.io/ZVEI/TechnicalData/ProductClassId/1/1

Note: This is an indicative figure; the manufacturer/ supplier may use a heuristical model to distribute available stock to a forecasted number of industrial users. Useful for industrial users to assess individual need of products against assumed availability.
Note: This SMC can be added to annotate changes in DataElements of existing Submodels (e.g. for technical data) and to provide more specific information to reason and items of a VDMA 24903 change.
Note: An arbitrary Property, MLP, Range-element can be placed in this structure with arbitrary semanticId. It is marked by the supplementalSemanticId for 'new value'.
Note: The set of technical data in the definition refers to the Submodel for technical data in the AAS.
Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the reason id given by ECLASS.

Note: For the recommended items, the technical data elements are individually grouped in fit, form, function, other. As different alternatives might engange different groupings, the respective technical data elements of the item of change are not grouped, at all.
Note: If possible, technical data elements in the recommended items should find its counterparts here (that is: DataElement with identical semanticId).

Note: Each DataElement represents a change of a technical data element. DataElements such as Property, MultiLanguageProperty and Range are applicable. To bring about the information, both idShort and semanticId can be set to the resepctive {arbitrary} attribute of the corresponding  technical data element.
Note: The supplier is encoraged to provide recommended items.
Note: mandatory property according to EU Machine Directive 2006/42/EC.
Note: mandatory property according to EU Machine Directive 2006/42/EC.
Note: Mandatory, as required to order.
Common version identifier of the used classification system, in order to distinguish different version of the property dictionary.
Note: Casing is to be ignored.
Note: the SMT "Technical Data" refers to this as: [IRI] https://admin-shell.io/ZVEI/TechnicalData/ClassificationSystemVersion/1/1
Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the product class.
Note: the SMT "Technical Data" refers to this as: [IRI] https://admin-shell.io/ZVEI/TechnicalData/ProductClassId/1/1
Note: it is recommended that the selected property types for the recommended items are matching to the provided properties if the item of change to allow a one-by-one comparison of items.

Note: the manufacturers are recommended to select only those property types, which support a meaningful comparison of the recommendation with the item of change. To many property types are considered to increase the signal/ noise ratio of information.

Note: It is the suppliers role to assess the provided technical data elements of the recommended item with respect to the actual item of change. A percentage is given between 0% (totally not suitable at all) and 100% (equal performance to the actual item of change).
Arbitrary Property, MLP or Range elements with specific semanticIds might be added.
Note: it is recommended that the selected property types for the recommended items are matching to the provided properties if the item of change to allow a one-by-one comparison of items.

Note: the manufacturers are recommended to select only those property types, which support a meaningful comparison of the recommendation with the item of change. To many property types are considered to increase the signal/ noise ratio of information.

Note: It is the suppliers role to assess the provided technical data elements of the recommended item with respect to the actual item of change. A percentage is given between 0% (totally not suitable at all) and 100% (equal performance to the actual item of change).
Arbitrary Property, MLP or Range elements with specific semanticIds might be added.
Note: it is recommended that the selected property types for the recommended items are matching to the provided properties if the item of change to allow a one-by-one comparison of items.

Note: the manufacturers are recommended to select only those property types, which support a meaningful comparison of the recommendation with the item of change. To many property types are considered to increase the signal/ noise ratio of information.

Note: It is the suppliers role to assess the provided technical data elements of the recommended item with respect to the actual item of change. A percentage is given between 0% (totally not suitable at all) and 100% (equal performance to the actual item of change).
Arbitrary Property, MLP or Range elements with specific semanticIds might be added.

Note: the manufacturers are recommended to select only those property types, which support a meaningful comparison of the recommendation with the item of change. To many property types are considered to increase the signal/ noise ratio of information.
Note: the SMC TechnicalData_Other is supposed to comprise meaningful property instances, which do not fit into the categorries fit, form, function.

Note: It is the suppliers role to assess the provided technical data elements of the recommended item with respect to the actual item of change. A percentage is given between 0% (totally not suitable at all) and 100% (equal performance to the actual item of change).
Arbitrary Property, MLP or Range elements with specific semanticIds might be added.
Note: see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Incoterms
Arbitrary SubmodelElements with specific semanticIds might be added.

definition.text: address information of a business partner
Adressinformationen zu einem Geschäftspartner
properties characterizing a geographical location where individual people and organizations are residing according to an address system
Merkmale, die einen geografischen Ort kennzeichnen, wo die eine Organisation oder eine Kontaktperson residieren, und die einem Adress-System entsprechen
individual record of product change notification data; provided by the manufacturer; extended over life-time
individueller Datensatz der Produktänderungsmeldung; bereitgestellt vom Hersteller; ergänzt über die Lebensdauer
set of information identifying the manufacturer or supplier, which puts the described items on the market
Reihe von Informationen zur Identifizierung des Herstellers oder Lieferanten, der die beschriebenen Artikel in Umlauf bringt
id of change given by and specific to individual namespace of the manufacturer
ID der Änderung, die von und spezifisch für den individuellen Namensraum des Herstellers angegeben ist
defined point in time with a specific meaning for life-cycle management
definierter Zeitpunkt mit spezifischer Bedeutung im Lebenszyklus-Management

preferredName.text: Classification of Product Change Notification reason

definition.text: individual classification of reason of change
individuelle Klassifkationen des Änderungsgrundes
comment explaining the reason of change and further circumstances in natural language.
Kommentar, der den Grund der Änderung und weitere Umstände in allgemeiner Sprache erläutert
UTC calendar date when the change will take place
UTC-Kalenderdatum, an dem die Änderung wirksam wird
UTC calendar date when the record of change was initially published by the manufacturer
UTC-Kalenderdatum, an dem die Aufzeichnung der Änderung erstmals vom Hersteller veröffentlicht wurde
information set which describes an item of change by the manufacturer
Datensatz, der den geänderten Artikel beschreibt
reference to asset identification of the item in the domain of the manufacturer
Verweis auf die Identifizierung des Assets in der Domäne des Herstellers
version of the hardware supplied with the device
Version der Hardware, mit der das Gerät ausgeliefert wird
quantitative statement about the set of products in warehouse / storage
Quantitative Angabe zur Menge von Produkten, sie sich auf Lager befinden

description.text: Note: it is recommended to provide at least a classification of the item according to VDMA24903 and according ECLASS.

definition.text: single product classification item by association with product class in a particular classification system or property dictionary
Einzelnes Produktklassifikationselement nach Zuordnung zur Produktklasse in einem bestimmten Klassifikationssystem oder Eigenschaftsverzeichnis
set of SubmodelElements describing technical properties of the item, in particular regarding the fit of the product
Menge von Submodel-Elementen, die die technischen Eigenschaften des Artikels beschreiben, insbesondere in Bezug auf die Eignung des Produkts
set of SubmodelElements describing technical properties of the item, in particular regarding the (outer) form of the product
Menge von Submodel-Elementen, die die technischen Eigenschaften des Artikels beschreiben, insbesondere in Bezug auf die äußere Form des Produkts
set of SubmodelElements describing technical properties of the item, in particular regarding the function of the product
Menge von Submodel-Elementen, die die technischen Eigenschaften des Artikels beschreiben, insbesondere in Bezug auf die Funktion des Produkts
set of SubmodelElements describing technical properties of the item, not being regarding the fit, form or function of the product
Menge von Submodel-Elementen, die die technischen Eigenschaften des Artikels beschreiben, nicht in Bezug auf die Eignung, Form oder Funktion des Produkts
set of information describing conformity declaration, certificate and suitability for different industrial sectors (branches)
Menge von Informationen, die Konformitätserklärungen, Zertifikate und die Eignung für verschiedene Industriezweige (Branchen) beschreiben
expected duration in working days of delivery towards representative customers in the same region
Angabe der voraussichtlichen Dauer in Werktagen der Lieferung an repräsentative Kunden in der gleichen Region
expected duration in working days of delivery towards representative customers in other regions
Angabe der voraussichtlichen Dauer in Werktagen der Lieferung an repräsentative Kunden in anderen Regioen
international coding of transport, costs and insurance according to INCOTERMS 2000, UN/ECE, Recommendation No. 5 (ECE/TRADE/259)
internationale Kodierung von Transport, Kosten und Versicherung gemäß INCOTERMS 2000, UN/ECE, Recommendation No. 5 (ECE/TRADE/259)

description.text: Note: Examples for common names for classification systems are "ECLASS" or "IEC CDD".
Note: the SMT "Technical Data" refers to this as: [IRI] https://admin-shell.io/ZVEI/TechnicalData/ProductClassificationSystem/1/1

definition.text: reference to the scheduled collection of abstract concepts that are used to distinguish and order objects
referenz der planmäßigen Sammlung von abstrakten Konzepten, die zur Abgrenzung und Ordnung von Objekten verwendet werden
referenced state of development of documents and applications
Referenziertes Entwicklungsstadium von Dokumenten und Applikationen
class of the associated product or industrial equipment in the classification system. According to the notation of the system
Klasse des zugehörigen Produkts oder der zugehörigen Industrieausrüstung im Klassifikationssystem. Entsprechend der Notation des Systems (IRDI)
rough categorization of the unit for rule-based processing
grobe Kategorisierung der Einheit für die regelbasierte Verarbeitung
class of the reason itself with code as alphanumerical string
Klasse des Grundes selbst. Code als alphanumerische Zeichenfolge
indicator, to which degree in terms of fit, form, function the match to the item of change is achieved by the particualr given item. Ranges from 0.0 to 1.0, or 0% to 100%.

Indikator, in welchem Maße in Bezug auf Anpassung, Form, Funktion die Übereinstimmung mit dem Veränderungsposten durch den jeweils gegebenen Posten erreicht wird. Reicht von 0,0 bis 1,0 oder 0% bis 100%
submodel containing a set of product change notifications over life-time
Teilmodell, das eine Reihe von Produktänderungsbenachrichtigungen über die Lebensdauer enthält
declaration of an AAS event, which is able to publish the extending of this Submodel by incementally adding product change notifications
Deklaration eines AAS Events, das die Erweiterung dieses Teilmodells durch schrittweises Hinzufügen von Produktänderungsmeldungen veröffentlichen kann
short description of the product (short text)
Kurze Beschreibung des Produktes (Kurztext)
2nd level of a 3 level manufacturer specific product hierarchy
2. Ebene einer 3 stufigen herstellerspezifischen Produkthierarchie

legally valid designation of the natural or judicial person which is directly responsible for the design, production, packaging and labeling of a product in respect to its being brought into circulation

Bezeichnung für eine natürliche oder juristische Person, die für die Auslegung, Herstellung und Verpackung sowie die Etikettierung eines Produkts im Hinblick auf das 'Inverkehrbringen' im eigenen Namen verantwortlich ist
set of information detailing on the particular changes of a product change notification
Menge von textbasierten Informationen, die die konkreten Änderungen einer Produktänderungsmitteilung detailliert beschreiben
set of life-cycle milestones, which are set with a new validity date
Meihe von Meilensteinen im Lebenszyklus, für die ein neues Gültigkeitsdatum festgelegt wird
information set which describes a recommended substitution by the manufacturer
Informationssatz, der eine vom Hersteller empfohlene Ersatz eines Gegenstandes beschreibt
set of product classifications
Menge an Produktklassifikationen
A value information representing the new value of a technical data element
Eine Wertangabe, die den neuen Wert eines technischen Datenelements angibt
file in common data format providing further descriptive information or information in natuaral language or graphical representation
Datei im gängigen Datenformat, die weitere beschreibende Informationen oder Informationen in natürlicher Sprache oder grafischer Darstellung enthält
set of information elements provided to describe changes in (existing) technical data of the item in a semantically enabled way
Menge von Informationselementen, die bereitgestellt werden, um Änderungen an den (vorhandenen) technischen Daten des Gegenstands auf semantisch aussagekräftige Weise zu beschreiben
single change element to changes of techncial data containing semantically enabled information
Einzelnes Änderungselement für Änderungen an technischen Daten, die semantisch verarbeitbare Informationen enthalten
back-reference to the respective element in the set of technical data, where the change originates
Verweis auf das entsprechende Element in den technischen Daten, von dem die Änderung stammt

description.text: Note: A number of recommened items, which propose substitution of the item of change, if this becomes unavailable

definition.text: set of recommened items, which propose substitution of the item of change, if this becomes unavailable
Menge empfohlener Gegenstände, die als Ersatz für den geänderten Gegenstand vorgeschlagen werden, falls dieser nicht mehr verfügbar ist

preferredName.text: Classifications of Product Change Notification reason

definition.text: one or more classifications of reason of change
mindestens eine oder mehrere Klassifkationen des Änderungsgrundes

description.text: Note: The list of File elements can be used to attach a set of conventional "product change information" already provided by many suppliers.

definition.text: files in common data format providing further descriptive information or information in natuaral language or graphical representation
Datei(en) in gängigen Datenformaten, die weitere beschreibende Informationen oder Informationen in natürlicher Sprache oder grafischer Darstellung enthalten
set of technical data elements describing the current state of the item of change compared with other recommended items
Menge von technischen Datenelementen, die den aktuellen Status des Änderungsgegenstands im Vergleich zu anderen empfohlenen Gegenständen beschreiben
list of records of single product change informations
Liste der Datensätze von Produktänderungsmeldungen (PCN)
definition of one milestone in the life-cycle of a industrial item or product
Definition eines Meilensteins im Lebenszyklus eines industriellen Gegenstands oder Produkts

description.text: Note: Multiple classification systems might be used.
Constraint: At least one item classification according VDM24903 shall be given.

definition.text: set of categorizations of the item of change either as a whole or affect sub-item according VDMA 24903 and further norms
Kategorisierungen des Änderungsgegenstands als Ganzes oder als Teilgegenstand gemäß VDMA 24903 und weiteren Normen
categorization of the item of change either as a whole or affect sub-item according VDMA 24903 and further norms
Beschreibung der Produktkategorie, wenn die Einheiten zu einer bestimmten Produktkategorien gehört

description.text: Note: Examples for common names for classification systems are "VDMA24903".

definition.text: classification system used for the item categorization of the item of change for rule-based processing
Klassifizierungssystem zur Einordnung des Änderungsobjekts für die regelbasierte Verarbeitung

description.text: Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the reason id given by ECLASS.

definition.text: class of the item category of a change according VDMA24903 coded as alphanumerical string
Klasse des Artikel-Typs einer Änderung gemäß VDMA24903, kodiert als alphanumerische Zeichenfolge

description.text: Note: Multiple classification systems might be used.
Constraint: At least one item category according VDM24903 shall be given.

definition.text: set of part numbers affected by the present product change notification, if not the whole set for product family and designation
Menge der von der Produktänderungsmitteilung betroffene Teilnummern
part numbers affected by the present product change notification
von der Produktänderungsmitteilung betroffene Teilnummer

Beginn der Herstellung

Nicht empfohlen für Neukonstruktionen

Produktänderungsmitteilung

Einstellung der Herstellung

definition.text: End Of Service and Repair
Einstellung von Service, Wartung und Reparatur
human readable title (summary) of information of particular changes of a product change notification
Lesbarer Titel (Zusammenfassung) der Informationen zu bestimmten Änderungen in einer Produktänderungsmitteilung
human readable body (details) of information of particular changes of a product change notification
Lesbarer Text (Details) zu den Informationen über bestimmte Änderungen in einer Produktänderungsmitteilung

description.text: Note: Ideally, the Property/valueId is used to reference the IRI/ IRDI of the reason id given by ECLASS.

definition.text: definition, if the PCN record represents a product change notification (PCN) or a product discontinuance notice (PDN)
Angabe, ob der PCN-Datensatz eine Produktänderungsmitteilung (PCN) oder eine Produktabkündigungsmitteilung (PDN) darstellt

description.text: Note: Optional, as it might not exist for long term used items.

definition.text: by manufacturer issued unique combination of numbers and letters used to identify the device for ordering
vom Hersteller vergebene eindeutige Zahlen- und Buchstabenkombination, mit der das Gerät für die Bestellung identifiziert wird
